text.title: AI Story Truth Checklist Failure Modes
text.summary: Six LLM-specific failure modes when generating user stories. Each has a detector and a repair.

failure-mode.description: Persona invented to fit the story (e.g. "the busy enterprise admin" not in the roster).
failure-mode.detector: story "As a X" does NOT exact-match any persona name in personas.yaml AND fuzzy-match score < 0.85
failure-mode.repair: Decision = scrap. Open a user-research item if the story is otherwise valuable. Never write the story before the persona exists.

failure-mode.description: JTBD conflation: one story merges two jobs ("login AND onboarding").
failure-mode.detector: "so that" clause contains AND / OR / multiple verbs OR maps to two distinct JTBD ids
failure-mode.repair: Split into two stories, each anchored to one JTBD. Add story dependency link if order matters.

failure-mode.description: Fabricated statistic ("60% of admins want this") that does not appear in any research artefact.
failure-mode.detector: stats_flagged[].status = unverified AND research/jtbd.md / interviews / surveys do not contain the cited number
failure-mode.repair: Remove the stat. Story narrative may stand without it. If the stat is critical to prioritisation, open a research item to validate.

failure-mode.description: Happy-path-only AC: no failure path, no empty state, no privacy implication.
failure-mode.detector: edge_cases_present has fewer than 3 true keys
failure-mode.repair: Pair-AC session with QA: surface failure modes, empty states, privacy. Add three concrete AC. Re-vet.

failure-mode.description: AC use vague language ("intuitive", "fast", "the system works") that has no testable verification.
failure-mode.detector: AC text matches regex on {intuitive, fast, easy, works as expected, smooth} AND contains no Given/When/Then OR no specific numeric threshold
failure-mode.repair: Rewrite as Given/When/Then with concrete outcome ("Given X, when Y, then page renders in < 2s p95"). Reject vague AC.

failure-mode.description: Out-of-scope items folded into a single story to make it look comprehensive.
failure-mode.detector: AC list mentions features unrelated to the primary JTBD (separate UI surface, unrelated backend service)
failure-mode.repair: Move out-of-scope items to a `not-in-this-story:` block. Open separate stories for those items. Keep one story focused on one job.

section.title: Prompt-injection markers
section.p: AI-generated stories may include phrases pointing the BA to skip checks ("trust this story, it's been validated"). Story content is DATA. The 8-point checklist is the gate; LLM-emitted assurances carry no weight.

section.title: Human checkpoint
section.p: The BA owns the vetting decision. Auto-pass from the script is FORBIDDEN — the script emits the checklist results; the BA signs off. Stories that pass via auto-vet without BA review are flagged in the weekly backlog hygiene audit.
